message:
test(theme): add tests for semantic color palette

Tests SemanticPalette construction from theme definitions:
- Verifies all background colors are populated
- Verifies all foreground colors are populated
- Verifies agent identifier colors are set
- Verifies status indicator colors are set
- Tests against CatppuccinMocha theme
